old_value: {"id":"v2rayn-0mh","title":"Implement or remove window fix mode behavior","description":"window_fix_mode is persisted but window_visuals does not apply different behavior for the available modes. Either implement the modes or remove the exposed setting and model field.","acceptance_criteria":"Changing window fix mode has observable behavior covered by code/tests, or the unused setting is removed from UI/model/docs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:57Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:57Z","labels":["audit","next","ux"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-pfk","title":"Fix manual refresh behavior during background polling","description":"Manual refresh currently returns immediately when a background refresh is already in flight. Make manual refresh visible to the user and ensure it either queues after the background refresh or supersedes it safely.","acceptance_criteria":"Clicking Refresh during background polling must result in a user-visible refresh attempt and must not leave loading state stale.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:55Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:55Z","labels":["audit","next"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-je9","title":"Restart only the intended v2rayN process","description":"Restart fallback terminates every process named v2rayN. Target the process associated with the configured or detected v2rayN base path to avoid stopping unrelated instances.","acceptance_criteria":"Restart fallback terminates only the matching process and leaves unrelated v2rayN instances alone.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:57Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:57Z","labels":["audit","next"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-odi","title":"Restrict network check endpoints to safe public HTTP(S) targets","description":"Endpoint normalization allows arbitrary HTTP(S) hosts. Block loopback, private, link-local, metadata, and other local network targets unless an explicit trusted override is designed.","acceptance_criteria":"Custom latency/IP endpoints reject local/private targets and tests cover accepted public hosts plus rejected local targets.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:56Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:56Z","labels":["audit","next","security"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-10s","title":"Add dedicated leak-check diagnostics page","description":"Add DNS/WebRTC/IP leak diagnostics as a dedicated page or window.","acceptance_criteria":"Leak-check UI reports IP, DNS, and WebRTC-relevant signals with clear user-facing results.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:24:03Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:24:03Z","labels":["diagnostics","roadmap"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-1w8","title":"Add UI/E2E smoke tests for dashboard and settings flows","description":"Frontend coverage is mostly i18n parity. old_value: {"id":"v2rayn-nmv","title":"Warn before losing unsaved settings draft","description":"SettingsWindow tracks unsaved draft state for saved-only fields, but closing the settings window can discard those edits without warning.","acceptance_criteria":"Closing settings with unsaved saved-only fields prompts, preserves draft, or clearly communicates the discard behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:58Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:23:58Z","labels":["audit","next","ux"]}

{"id":"v2rayn-2yf","title":"Add installer packaging flow","description":"Add installer packaging in addition to the portable executable flow.","acceptance_criteria":"Installer build is documented, reproducible, and included in validation/release steps.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"lgg@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-05-28T07:24:01Z","created_by":"lgg","updated_at":"2026-05-28T07:24:01Z","labels":["packaging","roadmap"]}

{"acceptance_criteria":"Settings include diagnostics enable/disable and configurable HTTP(S) site URL. The dashboard shows the diagnostics action only when enabled. Opening diagnostics loads the configured external site in a separate app WebView. No custom built-in leak diagnostics are added.","description":"Add an optional diagnostics page that is disabled by default. When enabled, the dashboard opens a configured external leak-test site (default https://ipleak.net/) in a separate app WebView. Do not implement built-in DNS/WebRTC/IP leak checks.","title":"Add optional external diagnostics WebView"}
